title: Spanish-Style Valenciana Chicken Paella
description: A classic Spanish dish originating from the Valencia region, this paella recipe combines tender chicken, savory rice, and rich seafood flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan or skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the chicken and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add the onion and garlic and cook until the onion is translucent, about 3 minutes.
Add the valenciana spice blend and cook for 1 minute.
Add the chwinamul and cook for 2 minutes.
Add the chicken broth and water, and bring to a boil.
Add the paella rice and stir to combine.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes.
Remove from heat and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
